title: 追憶の先のプリンシプル

text_block_list.text:
We get right back to our regular training after
summer camp. As part of that, we decide to hold
a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So, who's my opponent for today?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hiii, Hayahide! Are you as excited to race as I
am?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you sure you want me to race her? I
don't think revealing my strategies right before
the Kikuka Sho is a good idea.
choice_data_list:
I arranged this because I have a feeling you're
not ready.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying you know what's missing from the
equation I've poured myself into, then?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I get it. This race is meant to help me with
that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll get ready. And I'm not going to lose.

The race between Winning Ticket and Biwa
Hayahide begins.

Things start getting interesting on the
straightaway, right after the fourth corner...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I've pulled quite far ahead of Ticket. Her sprint
speed is worrisome, but according to our data, I
should be fine with this big of a lead.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ngh! RAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Is... Is she charging forward already? That's fast!
But that speed's not sustainable. She'll be out of
stamina in 200 meters!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not going to let her reckless gambit shake me
up, though. As long as I maintain this pace and
sprint in the final stretch...)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: RAAAGGGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I'm still in the lead. Stay calm. Just 300 meters to
go. I can maintain this lead. And once she runs
out of steam—)
choice_data_list: You need to go on the offensive, Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ngh, even if I wanted to—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrrrngh... WAAAGH! I... WILL... WIN!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(No way... How... How are you next to me? Now
you're in front?)

Winning Ticket overtakes Biwa Hayahide and flies
across the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... How?! How could I have...
choice_data_list: Why didn't you go on offense?
Why didn't you go on offense?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew! That was a nice one! Wanna go again? I
know how much it sucks to lose!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I like winning a lot too, so I won't just give
you the victory!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I think that's enough, wild child.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let her work at her own pace. If you still have
energy left over, why don't you go for a run with
me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go! Later, Hayahide.

After she finishes her cooldown, I hand Biwa
Hayahide a drink.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Remember how you told me I needed to go on
the offensive during the race?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I finally figured it out.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I didn't go on the offensive. It's that I
was too busy playing defense. That's the
difference between me and them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I was trying not to lose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I'm always playing it
safe. They invariably say they want to win, but I
only think about not wanting to lose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Even the winning equation I've been working on
since I was young...

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Wow! Brian is even faster than Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Parent
text_block_list.text:
She really is! Brian's so amazing. She might
outshine her older sister!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Don't count... me out! I'm gonna get... so much faster! I'll be.. the fastest anyone's ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll be fast enough... to beat Brian one day!
Crash!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis?!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I... I lost again... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll win next time! I'll come up with an equation to
win so I'll never lose to anyone! Especially not
her...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason I started working on my winning
equation was because I didn't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ironic, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder Ticket and Taishin always exceed
the parameters of my little calculations. Of course
they do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: They're always on the offensive—willing to do whatever it takes for a chance at victory because they're trying to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Their way of thinking differs from mine on a
fundamental level. There's simply no way my
equation can compete with them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How stupid of me to call it a "winning equation"
when all I've been doing is calculating how not to
lose!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why did it take me so long to figure it out?
What's the point anymore?!
choice_data_list:
Mistakes are learning opportunities. You can fix
it now that you've realized what's wrong.

text_block_list.text:
If Biwa Hayahide was the type of Umamusume to
throw away her dreams over something like this...

Then she would have given up a long time ago
when she got hurt trying to catch up to her sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That might be true, but we'll have to start over
from square one.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I established the equation on the wrong basis,
and now I have to scrap it and rebuild everything
from scratch.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's not much time until the Kikuka Sho. If we
do this, it's going to take up a lot of your time
too.
choice_data_list: You want to win the Kikuka Sho, right?
You want to win the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: If so, I'm here to help.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're... You're an idiot...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I'm an even bigger idiot, which is why I'm
accepting your offer.

We resume training immediately to reformulate
her winning equation.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hayahide, you really came!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Taishin said you were sure to show up if we
waited! Right, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Maybe you were waiting. I was letting you take a break so we could go for a run.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! You're such a meanie!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go for a run. Join us if you want. Or
don't.
choice_data_list: Are you two here to cheer Hayahide up?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yeah! We might be rivals, but we're friends
first and foremost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know you can always talk to us if you've got
something on your mind, right, Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I do... It seems I've been too narrow-minded. I'll
need to do something about that.

Biwa Hayahide jogs toward the track after her
friends.
